subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: House Law Enforcement and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses substance use interventions in communities and for criminal justice involved individuals.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>authorizes jails to establish recovery housing pods and establishes minimum requirements;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to the operation of a syringe exchange program, including to prohibit:<hr><ltbullet1> the distribution of drug paraphernalia other than syringes; and<hr><ltbullet1>the facilitation of the exchange of syringes in public parks;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes a justice court to create a Structured Treatment and Enforcement Pathway Supervision Program and establishes requirements;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes courts to enter an off-limits order to enjoin an individual who has been charged with or convicted of a drug offense from entering the geographic area where that individual committed or is charged with committing the drug offense;<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes; and<hr><ltbullet>defines terms.
